commit.message:
fix: register service worker via SerwistProvider for iOS PWA

The service worker was built but never registered — SerwistProvider
from @serwist/next/react was missing. Also adds manifest id field
for stable iOS 16.4+ PWA identity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: disable navigationPreload for iOS PWA + sync-complete event

- Disable navigationPreload in SW (broke iOS standalone mode + offline)
- Move themeColor from metadata to viewport export (Next.js warning)
- Emit sync-complete event after syncPendingMutations succeeds
- CaeTab listens for sync-complete to refresh data immediately

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add alembic files to backend Dockerfile for railway up deploys

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: video upload webm support + PWA standalone mode preservation

- Add "webm" to CAE_ALLOWED_TYPES (backend rejected MediaRecorder output)
- Add 5min timeout to file upload requests (was 30s global default)
- Replace hard location.href redirects with event-based auth-logout pattern
- Use router.replace instead of router.push for PWA navigation stability
- Add viewport export to root layout for iOS PWA rendering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: PWA login scope, video upload corruption, CAE form responsiveness

- Move PWA meta tags from terrain layout to root layout metadata API
  so Safari sees them on /login (standalone mode works)
- Fix video upload: skip File double-wrapping when compressImage returns
  original file unchanged (compressed === file check)
- Make CAE/VT form responsive: sidebar collapses to horizontal scroll
  on mobile, wizard grids stack vertically on small screens

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: update PROGRESS.md with PWA Sessions 1-4 completion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline file uploads with image/video compression (Session 4)

Photos compressed via Canvas API (5MB→300KB), videos capped at 1Mbps
bitrate (15MB→6MB). Files queue in IDB when offline, sync via FormData
through Axios on reconnect.

- compress-image.ts: Canvas API compression (max 1920px, JPEG 80%)
- offline-cae-service.ts: uploadFile, syncFileUpload, storage quota check
- cae-tab.tsx: handleFileUpload uses offlineCaeService (online + offline)
- video-record-dialog.tsx: videoBitsPerSecond 1Mbps cap

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline VT form — mutation queue + sync on reconnect (Session 3)

Queue VT field saves in IndexedDB when offline, sync automatically
via Axios (main thread) on reconnect with 30s polling interval.

- mutation-queue.ts: IDB CRUD with 5-retry limit
- sync-status.tsx: compact offline/pending/syncing/synced indicator
- use-sync-status.ts: polling hook for pending mutation count
- layout.tsx: SyncStatus component + online event listener + periodic sync

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline caching infrastructure — IDB schema + online status hook (Session 2)

- db.ts: IndexedDB schema with mutation-queue, offline-files, cae-cache stores
- constants.ts: cache TTL configuration
- use-online-status.ts: reactive hook for navigator.onLine state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: PWA foundation — installable app with service worker (Session 1)

Add web app manifest, Serwist service worker, install prompt banner,
and configure Next.js build pipeline for PWA generation.

- manifest.json: standalone terrain app with icons
- sw.ts: Serwist service worker with terrain-scoped caching
- install-prompt.tsx: bottom banner with 7-day dismiss cooldown
- next.config.mjs: wrapped with @serwist/next plugin
- Dockerfile.prod: copy public assets to standalone output
- Dependencies: @serwist/next, serwist, idb

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix clone URL in README and skill docs

Replace YOUR_USER/paver placeholder with calrunsIT/paverv2.

commit.message:
feat: Windows Git Bash 호환성 수정 + 글로벌 모델 설정 (~/.harness)

- Windows + Git Bash(xterm-256color)에서 prompt_toolkit Win32Output 충돌 수정
  → Vt100_Output + 올바른 Size(rows/columns) 반환으로 교체
- ~/.harness/settings.json 글로벌 기본값 지원
  → 프로젝트 .harness/ 없을 때 자동 폴백, 재설정 화면 스킵
- /model 변경 시 ~/.harness/settings.json에도 저장 (모든 프로젝트에 반영)
- /model 내 'Configure API key...' 항목 추가 → ~/.harness/.env에 저장 + 즉시 적용
- llm.py: ~/.harness/.env → .harness/.env → .env 순으로 dotenv 로드

commit.message:
fix(ci): add serviceId to Railway GraphQL query and harden jq parsing (#107)

The production deploy preflight was failing because the Railway GraphQL
API returns null edges when serviceId is omitted from the deployments
query. Also adds error response checking and null-safe jq expressions.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Classify AllProcedureTypesCoexist → §9.2 [skip ci]

The test instantiates initial, always_comb, and final blocks together in one module. IEEE 1800-2023 §9.2 (Structured procedures) is the clause that enumerates all structured procedure types and states there is no implied execution order between initial and always procedures, with no limit on how many can be defined. No more specific subclause covers the combination of all three types simultaneously.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Enhance trajectory visualizer UI: diff rendering, responsive layout, navigation, and raw statistics

- Add inline diff rendering with line-level syntax highlighting and collapsible file sections
- Add responsive CSS breakpoints (768px, 480px) for tablet/mobile layouts
- Add sidebar TOC for step navigation with toggle button
- Add keyboard navigation (j/k) and URL deep linking (#step-N)
- Replace CheckboxGroup filters with styled chip buttons
- Display raw trajectory statistics breakdown (raw vs parsed step counts)
- Show event count and user/assistant turn reconciliation in Output & Agent Stats
- Update KPI Steps subtitle to show both assistant and user counts

- Added showSkeletons() for immediate feedback while data loads
- Added updateHeaderStatus() to update gateway dot + model badge in header
- Appended CSS compat bridge mapping legacy classes to new design tokens
  (.ok/.bad/.warn, .dot.green/.dot.red with pulse, .kpi, .model-badge, etc.)
- Added refreshStatus() alias for load()
- Added prominent model picker in Settings section (#model-picker-select)

- Added View Transitions API for section navigation with fallback

Add click sparks, ripple, float pulse, cursor, viewer icon update

- Change Viewer building emoji from 👀 to 🖱️ (matches clicker theme)

- Controller idle animation now pulses scale 1→1.09→1 (slow float

Use designated initializers and add controls hint to details panel

- Switch all Game and Source structs to C99 designated initializers
  for clarity and resilience to field reordering

- Add styled "press c for all controls" hint below keys preview

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Personal Performance Optimizer (#1)

* fix: resolve 3 pre-existing bugs and harden auth for API routes

- Fix _request() returning None on retry exhaustion (todo #017)
- Cap Retry-After sleep to 10s to prevent worker blocking
- Standardize all date.today() to UTC (todo #028)
- Add .catch() to all frontend API calls (todo #033)
- Return 401 JSON on /api/* routes instead of 302 redirect

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: extract routes into Flask Blueprints

Move all route logic from monolithic app.py into routes/ modules:
- routes/briefing.py: briefing, recovery, snapshot endpoints
- routes/runs.py: run CRUD, shoes, trends endpoints
- app.py: thin assembly (auth middleware, security headers, blueprint registration)

Auth now uses before_request middleware instead of per-route decorators.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add models, coaching service, and API endpoints for performance optimizer

New database models:
- UserProfile: age, height, weight, max HR, goals (Numeric, CHECK constraints)
- NutritionLog: daily calories + protein tracking
- BodyComp: weight + body fat % tracking

New service layer:
- services/coaching.py: pure computation (EF, VDOT, TSS, CTL/ATL/TSB, ACWR, VO2max, workout prescription)
- services/metrics_service.py: orchestration (fetch data → compute → return MetricsSnapshot)

New API endpoints:
- GET/PUT /api/profile (upsert, single user)
- CRUD /api/nutrition (calories + protein logging)
- CRUD /api/body-comp (weight + body fat tracking)
- GET /api/metrics (training load, EF trend, ACWR)
- GET /api/longevity (VO2 max estimate, Zone 2 progress)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: enhance briefing with structured JSON and workout prescription

The /api/briefing endpoint now returns machine-readable structured fields:
- workout: type, distance, pace range, hr_cap, description, rationale
- pace_progress: current VDOT, target VDOT, EF trend
- nutrition_target: calorie/protein targets, yesterday's intake
- body_comp: weight, trend, body fat, weeks to goal
- longevity: VO2 max estimate, category, Zone 2 progress

Each section gracefully degrades to null when data is missing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add full frontend with navigation, nutrition, body comp, longevity, and settings

New tabbed UI with 5 sections:
- Dashboard: briefing (now shows workout prescription + pace progress), run logger, shoes, snapshot, trends
- Nutrition: log calories + protein, daily targets vs actual, progress bars
- Body Comp: log weight + body fat %, current stats, history
- Longevity: VO2 max estimate with category ring, Zone 2 weekly progress, training metrics (CTL/ATL/TSB/ACWR)
- Settings: profile form (age, height, weight, max HR, goals)

Profile banner prompts setup when no profile exists.
All API calls have .catch() handlers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: mark completed items in plan

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: resolve code review findings — validation, session safety, bounded queries

- Add input validation to PUT /api/nutrition (parity with POST)
- Add type coercion to PUT /api/profile (prevents DB errors on bad input)
- Extract profile data before session close in briefing route (prevents DetachedInstanceError)
- Add ?days= filter to GET /api/runs and GET /api/trends (default 90)
- Add try/except for query param parsing across all routes
- Extract shared validate_log_date() helper to utils.py (DRY)
- Remove unused imports (functools.wraps, get_session)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: complete remaining features — trends, projections, rolling averages, backfill

- Nutrition: 7-day rolling averages, protein compliance %, training-day
  caloric adjustment (hard/easy/rest day targets)
- Body comp: weight + BF% trend charts (Chart.js), weekly weight trend,
  projected weeks to weight and body fat goals, delete entries
- Longevity: RHR and HRV 90-day trend charts with direction indicators
- Backfill: POST /api/backfill endpoint computes EF for all historical runs
- Briefing: caloric targets now scale by workout type (15x weight on hard
  days, 13x easy, 11x rest)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix auth on HTTPS: detect cookie name from request protocol

The middleware was using NEXTAUTH_URL (a v4 env var) to determine the
session cookie name. Since it wasn't set, the middleware always looked
for the HTTP cookie name, missing the __Secure- prefixed cookie on
production HTTPS. Also redirect authenticated users from home to dashboard.

fix: simplify Mermaid diagram syntax for GitHub rendering Remove

commit.message:
Lower invisible piece threshold from 12% to 3%

12% was hiding legitimate edge pieces causing puzzles to complete early.
3% only hides pieces that are nearly fully transparent.

- Set acted=true on Adjust to prevent double-click race

commit.message:
Remove disabled ActionSearchPlayerAtWall from SurvivorAnims patch

The action's ActionCondition always returns false (disabled by the
mod author). Referencing the class in SetActions creates a compile
dependency on ActionSearchPlayer.c file ordering. Remove it to
eliminate a potential compile-order error for zero functionality loss.

commit.message:

- Table: 55 new pages (Table.Column, Table.Transpose, Table.FuzzyJoin,

- Date: 45 new pages (all Date.IsIn* filter functions, week/quarter/day
  helpers, format/parse functions)

- DateTimeZone: 11 new pages
- Duration: 5 new pages
- Time: 4 new pages
- Number: 42 new pages (trig, bitwise, type conversions, log/exp, etc.)
- Record: 9 new pages
- Type: 18 new pages
- Value: 9 new pages
- Accessing Data: 24 new pages (Sql, SharePoint, Folder, OData, PDF,
  Web.Page, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle, Azure Storage, ODBC, etc.)

All 40 tests continue to pass (content-integrity, parsers, mdx, search).

commit.message:
Fix clean_start() to clean all three PKI hierarchies and kill stale rootlessport

clean_start() only cleaned pki-compose.yml (RSA), leaving ECC and PQ containers
and volumes intact. When running --all after a previous run, stale containers
and rootlessport processes blocked port bindings. Now loops over all three
compose files and kills orphaned rootlessport processes owned by pkiuser.

fix: Use {country} placeholder in Apple Books URL templates

Replaces hardcoded country=US with {country} so the Apple Books storefront
matches the server's regional setting (CoreConfiguration.Country, which
defaults to the host OS region).  BuildUrl already substitutes {country}
from the hydration pipeline, so no code change is required.

Also removed the unused &lang={lang}_{country} query parameter — Apple Books
search does not require a lang parameter and it was causing noise.

commit.message:
fix(chat): implement Web Speech API dictation for mic button (JOV-1329) (#5420)

Reset the SpeechRecognition instance after each session ends so that
subsequent mic taps create a fresh instance instead of reusing the
stopped one. Calling start() on a terminated instance throws
InvalidStateError in Chrome, which was silently swallowed — leaving
the button appearing to toggle the mic on/off (mute behaviour) with
no transcription.

Also capture a pre-dictation baseline of the input value so that
speech transcript is appended to existing text rather than replacing it.

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
